languages.original_text: "Thank you for indulging my curiosity. Now it is your turn to select the topic of conversation."

languages.text: "Благодарю, что потешили мое любопытство. Теперь ваш черед задавать тему беседы".
"Thank you for indulging my curiosity. Now it is your turn to select the topic of conversation."
languages.original_text: "Благодарю, что потешили мое любопытство. Теперь ваш черед задавать тему беседы".

traits.locale_text: "Thank you for indulging my curiosity. Now it is your turn to select the topic of conversation."
"Thank you for indulging my curiosity. Now it is your turn to select the topic of conversation."
"Thank you for indulging my curiosity. Now it is your turn to select the topic of conversation."

languages.text: «Gracias por satisfacer mi curiosidad. Ahora, le toca a usted seleccionar el tema a debatir».
languages.original_text: "Thank you for indulging my curiosity. Now it is your turn to select the topic of conversation."

traits.locale_text: «Gracias por satisfacer mi curiosidad. Ahora, le toca a usted seleccionar el tema a debatir».

languages.text: “感谢您满足我的好奇心。现在轮到您选择话题了。”
languages.original_text: "Thank you for indulging my curiosity. Now it is your turn to select the topic of conversation."

traits.locale_text: “感谢您满足我的好奇心。现在轮到您选择话题了。”

languages.text: « Merci d'avoir satisfait ma curiosité. C'est à vous maintenant de choisir un sujet de conversation. »
languages.original_text: "Thank you for indulging my curiosity. Now it is your turn to select the topic of conversation."

traits.locale_text: « Merci d'avoir satisfait ma curiosité. C'est à vous maintenant de choisir un sujet de conversation. »

languages.text: "Danke, dass Ihr meine Neugier befriedigt. Nun seid Ihr an der Reihe. Wählt unser nächstes Thema."
languages.original_text: "Thank you for indulging my curiosity. Now it is your turn to select the topic of conversation."

traits.locale_text: "Danke, dass Ihr meine Neugier befriedigt. Nun seid Ihr an der Reihe. Wählt unser nächstes Thema."

languages.text: 「好奇心を満たしてくれてありがとう。次はあなたが話題を選ぶ番です」
languages.original_text: "Thank you for indulging my curiosity. Now it is your turn to select the topic of conversation."

traits.locale_text: 「好奇心を満たしてくれてありがとう。次はあなたが話題を選ぶ番です」

languages.text: "Merakımı giderdiğiniz için teşekkür ederim. Şimdi konuşma konusunu seçme sırası sizde."
languages.original_text: "Thank you for indulging my curiosity. Now it is your turn to select the topic of conversation."

traits.locale_text: "Merakımı giderdiğiniz için teşekkür ederim. Şimdi konuşma konusunu seçme sırası sizde."
